title: GoC G9B raw score sheet (immutable per evaluator)
description: Pointer or embedded copy of one evaluator's G9 matrix. At least one of frozen_g9_matrix_file_ref or inline_matrix should be present when evidence is complete.

frozen_g9_matrix_file_ref.description: Path or URI to an immutable copy of the filled g9_experience_score_matrix JSON for this evaluator.

inline_matrix.description: Embedded full matrix document (same shape as g9_experience_score_matrix_v1) when file ref is not used.

integrity_note.description: Optional hash or witness for the frozen artifact; does not replace storing the raw matrix.
